reconstructed_from: spec.md acceptance status and repository implementation evidence on claude/vital-core-issue-214-spec-m237h3 (PR #223)

criteria.description: mcp/ package implements an MCP server over stdio, Node.js ESM >=20, no network port opened by default
criteria.evidence: mcp/server.js; tests/unit/mcp/server.test.js; smoke-tested against the real stdio transport via a spawned child process.

criteria.description: Server reads and validates .vital.yml before starting; refuses on invalid config with a specific error
criteria.evidence: mcp/config/vital-config.js resolveVitalConfig(); tests/unit/mcp/vital-config.test.js covers each validation failure.

criteria.description: .vital.yml supports version/instance.api/instance.domain and ${ENV_VAR} substitution
criteria.evidence: mcp/config/vital-config.js substituteEnvVars(); tests cover set/unset env vars and non-echo of substituted values.

criteria.description: vital_get_project_context returns instance/domain/warnings, never secrets
criteria.evidence: mcp/tools/get-project-context.js; tests/unit/mcp/get-project-context.test.js includes an extra-field (simulated secret) leak test.

criteria.description: vital_list_findings fetches the latest (or specified) week, filters by severity/min_pages_affected/rule_id, sorts by pages_affected
criteria.evidence: mcp/tools/list-findings.js; tests/unit/mcp/findings-tools.test.js.

criteria.description: vital_get_finding_context returns one finding's detail by id, sourced from already-fetched data
criteria.evidence: mcp/tools/get-finding-context.js; found:false path tested for unknown ids. No report-link field returned — the shipped /api/v1/ findings contract does not carry one; documented as a known limitation in MCP.md rather than fabricated.

criteria.description: Only the three documented /api/v1/ endpoints are ever fetched; no internal report artifacts
criteria.evidence: mcp/api/vital-api-client.js exposes only getIndex/getSnapshot/getFindings; no data/ or state/ access anywhere in mcp/.

criteria.description: Outbound requests restricted to the single configured host
criteria.evidence: mcp/security/host-allowlist.js assertAllowedUrl(); tests/unit/mcp/host-allowlist.test.js and vital-api-client.test.js assert a different host/scheme/port is blocked.

criteria.description: CLI entry point starts the server; documents client registration
criteria.evidence: package.json bin.vital-mcp; MCP.md Installation and Registering with an MCP client sections.

criteria.description: No filesystem access outside the package directory / disposable cache
criteria.evidence: Only fs use in mcp/ is fs.readFileSync of the configured .vital.yml path in vital-config.js; no other fs calls in mcp/.

criteria.description: No shell/process execution of any kind
criteria.evidence: No child_process import anywhere under mcp/.

criteria.description: Bounded API responses: timeouts, size caps, truncation signaled explicitly
criteria.evidence: vital-api-client.js AbortController timeout (VitalApiTimeoutError) and streamed size cap (VitalApiResponseTooLargeError); vital_list_findings returns truncated:true when capped.

criteria.description: Tool names/descriptions/schemas are static, never built from remote content
criteria.evidence: All three mcp/tools/*.js export static objects; no remote data is interpolated into a tool definition.

criteria.description: Remote finding text treated as inert data, never interpreted
criteria.evidence: tests/unit/mcp/findings-tools.test.js hostile-finding-text fixture asserts verbatim pass-through with no behavior change.

criteria.description: npm run test:unit stays green; tests follow the repo's real-module-API convention
criteria.evidence: 366/366 tests passing; no fs/db mocking anywhere in tests/unit/mcp/ (real fixture files and a real local HTTP server).

criteria.description: New dependency is the standard official MCP SDK, version pinned
criteria.evidence: package.json dependencies: "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk": "^1.29.0".

criteria.description: Read-only in every dimension: no write_patches, no write_repository, no command execution
criteria.evidence: No write-capable tool or config key implemented in mcp/.

criteria.description: Local stdio transport only; no network listener opened by the server itself
criteria.evidence: mcp/server.js uses StdioServerTransport only; no http.createServer or similar in mcp/.

criteria.description: Only the versioned /api/v1/ contract is consumed
criteria.evidence: Same as FR-07 evidence.

criteria.description: WebMCP not implemented in this mission
criteria.evidence: No browser-facing code added; MCP.md explicitly lists WebMCP under Not yet implemented.

criteria.description: MCP protocol/transport code kept separate from Vital-domain logic
criteria.evidence: mcp/server.js only wires config/api-client/tools; buildContext/listToolsResult/callTool are transport-independent and unit tested without the SDK's transport.
